name: Anderson Silva
oneLiner: The peak-aura case: historic middleweight title control, terrifying finishing dominance, and one of the most iconic prime runs in UFC history.
compareShortCase: Anderson is the peak-aura legend: the most iconic middleweight reign, terrifying finishing ability, and some of the most memorable dominance moments ever.
compareCounter: Anderson's argument is aura and peak fear factor. If someone values the most terrifying prime, he has one of the strongest cases ever.
compareWeakness: The Weidman losses matter because they land before the model fully moves Anderson into post-prime protection.
